Home / Services / Duct Cleaning

Duct Cleaning

Improve your indoor air quality with professional duct cleaning services.

Over time, dust, pollen, mold, and other contaminants can accumulate in your air ducts, affecting your indoor air quality and potentially triggering allergies and respiratory problems. RS Andrews of Tidewater provides professional duct cleaning services to remove these contaminants and improve the air you breathe.

Our experienced technicians use specialized equipment to thoroughly clean your ductwork, removing accumulated debris and allergens. We also inspect your ducts for any signs of damage or mold growth and recommend appropriate solutions. Clean air ducts can also improve the efficiency of your HVAC system, saving you money on energy bills.

If you're concerned about your indoor air quality or notice signs of dust or mold around your vents, call RS Andrews today for a professional duct cleaning. We'll help you create a healthier and more comfortable indoor environment.

Our Process

  1. 01 Inspect the ductwork for contaminants and damage.
  2. 02 Use specialized equipment to loosen and remove debris.
  3. 03 Vacuum the ductwork thoroughly.
  4. 04 Sanitize the ductwork (optional).

Benefits

  • Improved Air Quality
  • Reduced Allergens
  • Improved HVAC Efficiency
  • Healthier Indoor Environment

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I have my ducts cleaned?

The frequency of duct cleaning depends on factors such as the age of your home, the presence of pets or smokers, and any existing allergies or respiratory problems. We recommend having your ducts inspected at least every two years and cleaned as needed.

What are the signs that my ducts need cleaning?

Common signs include visible dust or mold around vents, musty odors, increased allergy symptoms, and unexplained respiratory problems.

Is duct cleaning messy?

Our technicians use specialized equipment and techniques to minimize mess during the duct cleaning process. We take precautions to protect your home and belongings.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with duct cleaning? Contact us today.
